Kuasai keahlian robotik dan pemrograman: Master robotics and programming skills with expert mentors using an international industry-standard curriculum.
Siapkan Karir Di Era Digital 4.0:
Prepare Your Career
In The Digital Era 4.0
Beta Badri is not just a course. We are a Tech Ecosystem designed to shape innovative mindsets for the younger generation.
Fokus kami adalah memberikan pengalaman: Our focus is providing learning experiences relevant to global industry developments. From Robotics, Artificial Intelligence, Fullstack Development, Cyber Security, to Game Development, we ensure every student is ready to face the challenges of the digital era 4.0.
Mempersiapkan talenta lokal untuk bersai: Preparing local talent to compete on the international technology stage.
Belajar lewat praktek langsung menggunak: Learn through direct practice using industry-standard technology devices.
Kami merancang kurikulum bertingkat untu: We design a tiered curriculum to shape technology experts, from basic logic to advanced cyber security.
Belajar mekanika & logika dasar mengguna: Learn basic mechanics & logic using child-friendly lego/modular robot kits.
Merakit komponen, menyolder, dan memprog: Assembling components, soldering, and programming microcontrollers (Arduino/IoT).
Pengembangan software mulai dari Web, Mo: Software development from Web, Mobile Apps, to Game Development (Python/JS).
Mengamankan jaringan, ethical hacking, d: Securing networks, ethical hacking, and digital system defense.
Menciptakan dunia virtual sendiri dengan: Create your own virtual worlds by learning Unity, Unreal Engine, and 3D asset design.
Kurikulum standar industri, mentor prakt: Industry standard curriculum, practitioner mentors, and a learning ecosystem that supports students not just to "know", but "able to create".
Materi disusun sistematis menyesuaikan u: Material is arranged systematically adjusting to age (Elementary, Junior, Senior High). Students learn logic foundations before entering complex coding syntax.
Kami percaya coding adalah skill praktis: We believe coding is a practical skill. Every meeting students must produce a project output, not just theory.
Dibimbing langsung oleh programmer & eng: Guided directly by experienced programmers & engineers who understand current technology industry needs.
Kami rutin mengirim siswa ke ajang kompe: We routinely send students to national and international robotics & coding competitions (Young Coder Cup).
Materi selalu di-update mengikuti perkem: Materials are consistently updated to keep pace with the latest technological advancements and dynamic global industry standards.
Penyampaian materi menggunakan Bahasa In: Material delivery uses both Indonesian and English to familiarize students with global technical terminologies.
Learning by doing. Setiap siswa wajib me: Learning by doing. Every student is required to complete a real-world project (App/Robot) at the end of each learning session.
Kelas kecil dengan fokus pada kecepatan: Small class sizes focusing on the unique learning pace of each student, ensuring no one is left behind.
Apa saja yang Kami Lakukan <br> <span cl:
What Do We Do
In Betabadri Classes?
Intip keseruan interaksi belajar mengaja: Take a peek at the fun interactions of teaching and learning robotics and coding in our various partner schools.
Isi formulir pendaftaran atau hubungi ad: Fill out the registration form or contact our admin to consult your child's learning needs.
Ikuti sesi percobaan gratis (Offline/Onl: Join a free trial session (Offline/Online) to experience our fun learning environment.
Siswa akan dinilai kemampuannya untuk pe: Students will be assessed to determine the most suitable class level for them.
Selamat! Anak Anda siap memulai petualan: Congratulations! Your child is ready to begin their adventure as a creator of future technologies.
Apakah pemula tanpa pengalaman coding bi: Can beginners with no coding experience join?
<strong>Tentu saja!</strong> Kurikulum k: Absolutely! Our curriculum is designed in levels. For beginners, we start with basic logic and visual programming (blocks) before moving on to more complex coding (syntax).
Perangkat apa saja yang perlu disiapkan: What equipment do students need to prepare?
Untuk kelas Programming, siswa wajib mem: For Programming classes, students are required to bring a standard specification Laptop (Windows/Mac with at least 4GB RAM). For Robotics classes, all kits and components are provided in our laboratory.
Apakah ada sertifikat setelah lulus?: Is there a certificate upon graduation?
Ya, setiap siswa yang menyelesaikan satu: Yes, every student who completes a material level and passes the final project exam will receive an official Certificate of Competence from Beta Badri Education.
Kami menyediakan opsi kelas <strong>Hybr: We provide a Hybrid class option. However, for maximum results, especially for Robotics classes, we highly recommend face-to-face (Offline) meetings for optimal practical experience.
Jangan biarkan anak hanya menjadi penikm: Don't let your children just be technology consumers. Join 700+ other students and start the journey to become technology creators today.
Curriculum Hero Desc: We provide the most complete technology curriculum for all ages. From assembling Lego robots, creating IoT devices, to developing digital applications.
Modular Desc: The first gate to the world of engineering without fear. Using assembly kits (like Lego/Vex) to learn movement mechanics, structure, and simple sensor logic.
Electronic Desc: Advanced level for those who want to build sophisticated tools from scratch. Learn to solder components, understand electricity, and program microcontrollers (Arduino/IoT) with C++.
Programming Desc: Master the digital language of the future. Starting from fun visual coding to building professional Websites, Mobile Apps (Android), and Game Development.
Game Desc: Turn your hobby into a masterpiece. Learn using Unity or Unreal Engine to create 2D/3D game worlds, complete with exciting gameplay mechanics.
Cyber Desc: Learn how to protect the digital world. From network basics, ethical hacking, to system defense techniques against complex cyber attacks.
Comparison Desc: A brief comparison table to help you decide.
Consultant Desc: Our education consultant team is ready to help map your child's interests & talents.
Modular Program Title: Modular Robotics Program - Beta Badri Education
Modular Hero Desc: Interactive robotics class without soldering. Learn principles of mechanics, sensors, and programming logic using international standard educational robot kits.
Why Modular Desc: Modular Robotics is the best gateway for children to get to know the world of engineering. Using a **Plug & Play** system, students can focus on understanding sensor logic and mechanics without the risk of damaged components due to soldering.
Modular Question: Does your child love Lego & Assembling?
Modular Question Desc: Channel their hobby into future technology expertise.
Modular Beginner Desc: Learn basic sensors, motion control, and robotic design.
Modular Intermediate Desc: Focus on programming & sensors for detection and manipulation.
Modular Advanced Desc: Advanced programming & sensor logic for complex robotics.
Electronic Program Title: Electronic Robotics Program - Beta Badri Education
Electronic Hero Desc: Elevate your skills to true engineer levels. Learn to assemble circuits, solder components, and program robot brains (Microcontrollers) using C++.
Why Electronic Desc: In the Industry 4.0 era, understanding both Hardware and Software (Coding) is crucial. This program bridges both. Students will learn how electricity works, how to read electronic schematics, and create Smart Home systems.
Electronic Level 1 Desc: Understanding resistors, capacitors, LEDs, and Ohm's law. Assembling simple circuits on a Breadboard.
Electronic Level 2 Desc: Start using Arduino Uno. Learn text-based coding (not blocks) to control lights and sound.
Electronic Level 3 Desc: Using light, temperature, and distance sensors while moving Servo motors. Automation logic (If/Else).
Electronic Level 4 Desc: Building chassis, soldering motor drivers, and programming Line Follower or Obstacle Avoider robots.
Electronic Level 5 Desc: Using ESP32/ESP8266. Connecting electronic devices to mobile phones (Blynk/Firebase) for Smart Homes.
Inventor Question: Ready to Become a Young Inventor?
Inventor Desc: Start your engineering journey today. Build your own sophisticated tools from scratch.
Programming Hero Desc: Master the language of the future. From fun visual programming logic to building your own Websites, Mobile Apps, and Games.
Why Coding Desc: Steve Jobs once said, "Everyone should learn how to program a computer, because it teaches you how to think." Coding is not just about typing lines of code, but training **Computational Thinking**: the ability to break down large problems into logical, solvable steps.
Programming Level 1 Desc: Learn basic coding concepts (Loop, Variable, If-Else) without typing, using fun visual blocks.
Programming Level 2 Desc: Build complete 2D games with scores, enemies, and levels. Trains coordinate math logic (X,Y).
Programming Level 3 Desc: Transition from blocks to text. Learn the popular Python language to create calculators and simple apps.
Programming Level 4 Desc: Build website structures, design beautiful interfaces, and make them interactive with JavaScript.
Programming Level 5 Desc: Modern web application development with Databases, Login Systems, and API Integration.
Programming Level 6 Desc: Create professional 3D games using Unity. Learn physics, asset management, and publishing.
App Dream Question: Ready to Build Your Dream App?
App Dream Desc: The digital world is waiting for your creation. Join our coding class now.
Game Dev Title: Game Development Program - Beta Badri Education
Game Hero Desc: Don't just be a player, be the creator! Learn algorithm logic, character design, and publish your own games to global platforms.
Why Game Dev Desc: Creating games is the best way to train mathematical logic and creativity simultaneously. At Beta Badri, students don't just learn coding, but also problem-solving skills useful for their future.
Phase 1 Desc: Understand basic programming concepts (Loop, Variable, Logic) using Scratch. Create your first 2D game.
Phase 2 Desc: Transition from blocks to text with Python (Pygame). Learn screen coordinates and user interaction.
Phase 3 Desc: Using Construct 3 or GDevelop. Learn about gravity, collision, and life systems (UI/HUD).
Phase 4 Desc: Focus on character creation (Pixel Art) and backgrounds. Learn frame-by-frame animation for game characters.
Phase 5 Desc: Build professional 3D games with Unity Engine. Learn complex C# scripts and game optimization.
Realize Dream Desc: Join our young developer community. Learn, create, and publish your work.
Mentor Hero Desc: Learn directly from industry practitioners and experienced educators.
Want to Join as an Instructor?: Want to Join as an Instructor?
Join Us Desc: If you have a passion for technology and education, let's create together with us.
No mentor data displayed: No mentor data has been displayed yet.
Vision Hero Desc: Our commitment to delivering inclusive and fun technology-based education in Pekanbaru and beyond.
Vision Quote: To be the Pioneer of Technology-Based Education rooted in Pekanbaru, inspiring the digital generation across Indonesia through inclusive, adaptive, and futuristic STEM learning experiences.
Mission 1: Providing access to quality and fun STEM education, starting from Pekanbaru and expanding throughout Indonesia.
Mission 2: Designing an interactive curriculum that fosters creativity and problem-solving skills.
Mission 3: Encouraging young people to become technology creators through applicative learning methods, not just users.
Mission 4: Fostering an inclusive learning culture, friendly to all, and relevant to the current developments of the digital world.
Mission 5: Acting as a strategic partner in technology education alongside schools, parents, and the community.
Collaborate Desc: Together, let's build the best technology education ecosystem in Riau.
Gallery Hero Desc: Peek into the excitement of learning, competitions, and precious moments of Beta Badri Education students.
